items.question: How do you ensure the quality of the restoration leads I receive?
items.answer: We carefully vet all of our leads to ensure that they are prospects who are in need of restoration services. We also have a team of experts who review each lead to make sure that it meets our high standards of quality.

items.question: What is your lead conversion rate?
items.answer: Our lead conversion rates vary depending on several factors including your location, service area, and how quickly you respond to leads. On average, our partners see conversion rates between 15-25% for restoration leads.

items.question: Can I get my restoration leads by location?
items.answer: Yes! We offer customizable location targeting that allows you to receive restoration leads from specific geographic areas. You can set your preferred service radius, cities, or zip codes to ensure you only receive leads in your target market.

items.question: How do you generate restoration leads?
items.answer: We generate restoration leads through a combination of targeted digital marketing campaigns, search engine optimization, and strategic partnerships. Our team uses advanced analytics to identify homeowners who need restoration services and are actively seeking help.

items.question: How much do your restoration leads cost?
items.answer: Our restoration leads are priced competitively based on your location and market demand. Pricing typically ranges from $25-$50 per lead, with volume discounts available for partners who commit to higher lead volumes. Contact us for a customized quote based on your specific needs.
